name: proc_creation_win_link_uncommon_parent_process
raw_query: any where (process.executable:"*\\link.exe" and process.command_line:"*LINK /*") and (not ((process.parent.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*")) and (process.parent.executable like~ ("*\\VC\\bin\\*", "*\\VC\\Tools\\*"))))
